info.title: Startup State Atlas API
info.summary: Utah's agent-readable map of startup companies and resources.
info.description:
The Startup State Atlas API powers the Founder Navigator, the Utah
Startup Map, and the agent-native CLI/MCP surfaces.

## Authentication

Two authentication modes are supported:

- **Better Auth session cookie** (`auth.session_token`) — set by
  `/sign-in` and `/sign-up`. Used by humans clicking through the
  web UI. Roles: `owner`, `goeo_admin`, `superadmin`.
- **`X-Atlas-Admin-Token`** header — service-account-style token
  validated against `env.ATLAS_ADMIN_TOKEN`. Used by the local
  CLI, the local stdio MCP server, and any external machine
  client. Bypasses Better Auth and assumes a privileged caller.

Read endpoints are open to both. Write endpoints accept either.
For owner-edit on `PATCH /api/v1/companies/{slug}`, the session
user id must match `companies.claimed_by_user_id`.

## Error envelope

Every non-2xx response uses the same shape:

```json
{ "error": { "code": "string", "message": "string", "details": "unknown?" } }
```

Codes used: `bad_request`, `not_found`, `forbidden`, `unauthorized`,
`conflict`, `internal`.

## Wire format

All wire fields are `snake_case`. Internal TS uses `camelCase` and
converts at the boundary via `lib/api-codec.ts`.

tags.name: recommend
tags.description: Score Utah resources against a founder profile.

tags.name: resources
tags.description: The library of Utah startup resources.

tags.name: saved
tags.description: Investor watchlist of saved companies (Phase 6 / Agent 8).

post.summary: Create a founder passport without computing recommendations.
Extract intake fields from a website URL via fetch + LLM.
post.description:
The user pastes a website URL on the intake form; this endpoint
fetches the page directly and pipes the text through Anthropic
with a structured-output prompt, returning a partial set of
fields the front-end can use to prefill chips. **No persistence.**
On fetch failure / non-HTML response / LLM timeout / private-IP
rejection the response degrades to `{ fields: [], degraded: true }`
— never returns 5xx for upstream failures.

website_url.description: Must use http:// or https://. Social/profile hosts (linkedin, x, github, etc.) are rejected.

get.summary: Return cached recommendations for a passport.

200.description: Plan (possibly empty if not yet computed).

post.summary: Score and bucket Utah resources for a founder's profile.
post.description:
Pass either `passport_id` (re-uses an existing passport row) or
a full `FounderPassportInput` (creates one) — but **not both**.

LLM "Because…" is enabled by default; on Anthropic error/timeout
the response degrades gracefully (`because: ""`) — the endpoint
never 5xxs on the LLM.

Side effects: if no `passport_id` is provided, a `founder_passports`
row is created. The full result set is persisted to
`recommendations` (idempotent; any prior recs for the passport
are deleted first).

get.summary: List startup resources, optionally filtered by free-text query.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Optional free-text query against title + description.

get.summary: Fetch a single resource by id.
Search companies by name / slug / website.
Fetch a single company by slug.

patch.description:
Three auth modes are accepted:

- **Owner**: Better Auth session whose `user.id` matches
  `companies.claimed_by_user_id`. Owner edits are restricted
  to a whitelist (no `slug`, `linkedin`, `address_text`).
- **Admin**: Better Auth session with role `goeo_admin` or
  `superadmin`. No whitelist.
- **Machine**: `X-Atlas-Admin-Token` header. No whitelist.

Every successful PATCH writes an audit row to `profile_updates`.

post.description:
Multipart upload (PDF / PNG / JPEG / WebP, ≤10 MB) routed to the
R2 `OWNERSHIP_DOCS` bucket. Creates a submission row with status
`pending`. If the caller already has a pending submission for the
same company, the existing row is returned with `duplicate: true`.

company_slug.description: Slug of the company being claimed.

get.summary: List all verified investors with public profiles.
get.description:
Public — no auth required. Returns only investors whose admin
review has flipped them to `verification_status = "verified"` and
who have published a slug. Email is never included.

get.summary: Return the public investor card for a given slug.
get.description:
Public — no auth required. Email is intentionally redacted; the
only way to surface contact info is via an admin-accepted intro
request.

patch.description:
Three auth modes:
- **Owner** (Better Auth session, `investor_profiles.user_id ===
  session.user.id`): can write the public-fields whitelist
  (display_name, bio, tagline, website, linkedin, slug while
  unverified). Editing display_name or website on a verified
  profile auto-flips `verification_status` back to `unverified`
  for re-review.
- **Admin** (`goeo_admin` / `superadmin`): can also write
  `verification_status`. Admin edits do NOT auto-unverify.
- **Machine** (`X-Atlas-Admin-Token`): same as admin.

get.description:
Session required. Returns the calling investor's watchlist
joined to companies. Returns an empty list if the caller has
no investor profile.

post.summary: Save a company to the caller's watchlist.

patch.summary: Update the note on a saved company.

delete.summary: Remove a company from the caller's watchlist.

get.description:
Session required. Returns:
- `outbound`: all rows where the caller is the requester, any status.
- `inbound`: rows targeted at the caller (their investor profile
  or claimed company), but only after admin moves them to
  `accepted` or `introduced`.

post.summary: Submit a new intro request to GOEO.
post.description:
Body's `target` is a discriminated union — exactly one of
`investor` or `company` may be specified. The requester's role
is snapshotted at request time so the audit trail reflects what
they were when they asked, not what they are now.

get.description:
Allowed for the requester, an admin, or the target party — but
the target only sees the row after admin moves it to `accepted`
or `introduced`.

patch.summary: Admin review — accept, decline, or mark introduced.
patch.description:
Admin only (`goeo_admin` / `superadmin`). Body's `status` must
be one of `accepted | declined | introduced`.

Concurrent-action guard: only `pending` rows are actionable.
Two admins acting near-simultaneously will see one win and one
get a 409.

Email side-effects:
- `accepted`: emails both parties with each other's contact info
  (or just the requester if the target hasn't claimed their
  profile, with a note that GOEO will follow up).
- `declined`: emails the requester only.
- `introduced`: emails the requester only (used when admin made
  the intro out-of-band).

get.summary: Return this OpenAPI 3.1 specification as JSON.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not authorized for this resource.

cookieAuth.name: auth.session_token
cookieAuth.description:
Better Auth session cookie. Set by `/sign-in` or `/sign-up`.
Roles: `owner`, `goeo_admin`, `superadmin`. Owner edits gate
on `companies.claimed_by_user_id` matching `user.id`.

atlasAdminToken.name: X-Atlas-Admin-Token
atlasAdminToken.description:
Service-account-style token validated against
`env.ATLAS_ADMIN_TOKEN`. The local CLI (`npm run cli` from a
checkout), the local stdio MCP server (`npm run mcp`), and
external machine clients use this header for write operations.
Bypasses Better Auth and assumes a privileged caller.

enrichment_source.description:
Set by the front-end to the enrich provider id (e.g.
`anthropic-fetch`) when the enrich path ran before
submission. Server stamps `enriched_at = now`.

RecommendRequest.description:
Either pass `passport_id` and skip the body (we'll load the
passport from D1), or pass a full `FounderPassportInput`. Sending
both with conflicting `stage`/`industry`/`goal` is a 400.

because.description: LLM "Because…" sentence; empty string on Anthropic timeout / parse failure.

action_text.description: Suggested next action; empty string when none.

degraded.description: Set when fetch / parse / LLM degraded; `fields` will be empty.

status.description: Computed from `claimed_by_user_id` + presence of pending ownership submission.

CompanyPatch.description:
Partial update. Owner edits accept only the whitelisted keys
below. Admin / machine token may also send `slug`, `linkedin`,
and `address_text`.

InvestorPublicPatch.description:
All fields optional. Owner edits are limited to the public
whitelist (display_name, bio, tagline, website, linkedin, slug
when unverified). `verification_status` is admin/machine only.
